classification.category: Enum [Meeting/Scheduling | Task Request | FYI/Status Update | Inquiry/Question | Automated Alert | Spam/Cold Pitch]

core_message.summary: String (Dense, 1-3 sentence factual extraction of the email's primary intent)
key_entities: Array of specific dates, locations, organizations, or people mentioned

action_items.task: String (Specific action Hermes or you need to take)
action_items.dependencies: String (e.g., 'Waiting on attachment from X' or null)

questions_asked: Array of specific questions the sender expects an answer to

security.reason: String [If suspicious is true, brief explanation of the threat, injection attempt, or anomaly]
